findingDetails.title: Resume continuity points back to completed research
findingDetails.description: Resume continuity still routes toward completed research rather than phase 004.
findingDetails.evidence: Parent and research-child continuity fields remain stale against completion summaries and the phase map.
findingDetails.recommendation: Route continuity to phase 004 and reconcile completed research-child metadata.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Canonical exact-grep replay covered parent and research-child continuity fields.

findingDetails.title: STUDY lacks an enforceable pre-prompt injection gate
findingDetails.description: Phase 006 does not reject or neutralize hostile corpus instructions before prompt assembly.
findingDetails.evidence: Research requires embedded prompt-injection fixtures; the phase-006 envelope and leak gate do not define pre-prompt hostile-instruction handling.
findingDetails.recommendation: Specify the pre-prompt injection gate and adversarial fixtures before implementation.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Canonical exact-grep and direct-read replay covered the upstream safety matrix and every phase-006 planning document.

findingDetails.title: Verification Summary totals undercount checklist obligations
findingDetails.description: Six implementation checklists publish totals that disagree with live priority rows.
findingDetails.evidence: Canonical exact-grep counts reproduce the six mismatches and phase-005 control match.
findingDetails.recommendation: Mechanically derive or validate summary denominators from live rows.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Canonical exact-grep replay covered all seven implementation checklists and all three priority classes.

findingDetails.title: Phase 004 documents retain orphan transport tags
findingDetails.description: Seven unmatched closing transport tags remain in phase 004 canonical documents.
findingDetails.evidence: Canonical exact-grep replay finds all seven only in phase 004.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the orphan tags and validate documents for malformed wrappers.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Canonical exact-grep replay covered every Markdown file under the phase parent.

findingDetails.title: Phase 004 handoff truncates the task queue at T028
findingDetails.description: The handoff summary ends at T028 while the authoritative queue ends at T030.
findingDetails.evidence: Canonical exact-grep replay confirms the bounded-range mismatch and no second target occurrence.
findingDetails.recommendation: Use T001-T030 or defer task bounds to tasks.md.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Canonical exact-grep replay compared bounded ranges against every phase-004 task id.
